sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 9.11 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.9)

statement.latex: Is an abelian minimal normal subgroup$A$of a group$G$an elementary$p 0.2ex$-group if the factor-group$G/A$is a soluble group of finite rank? The answer is affirmative under the additional hypothesis that$G/A$is locally polycyclic (D.\,I.\,Zaitsev, Algebra and Logic, 19, no.\,2 (1980), 94--105).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
